info.name: MolyWeb Backend API
info.description:
Complete API collection for MolyWeb Invoice Billing System

## Authentication
1. First call **Auth > Login** with default admin credentials
2. Copy the returned `token`
3. Set it as the `authToken` variable in the collection (or use the auto-set script)

Base URL: http://localhost:5000/api

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints - some public, some protected

query.description: Filter by status: paid, pending, overdue, draft

body.raw:
{
  "clientId": "CLIENT_ID_HERE",
  "clientName": "John Doe",
  "email": "john@example.com",
  "clientAddress": "123 Main St",
  "clientCity": "New York",
  "clientState": "NY",
  "amount": 1500.00,
  "paidAmount": 0,
  "dueDate": "2026-06-30",
  "status": "pending",
  "items": [
    { "description": "Web Development", "quantity": 1, "rate": 1200, "amount": 1200 },
    { "description": "Hosting (Monthly)", "quantity": 3, "rate": 100, "amount": 300 }
  ],
  "invoiceDate": "2026-05-01",
  "notes": "Payment due within 30 days"
}
